name: Autopilot
description: Operator-triggered "issue → merge-ready PR" pipeline. Start a YouTrack or GitHub issue into a visible, self-driving agent session in its own isolated worktree; it works the item behind a quality gate (visual verify, code review, security review, conventions), posts progress and questions back to the issue and moves its stage as it goes, and stops at a merge-ready PR — you approve the run before it starts and always do the merge yourself.
author: Cockpit
